macros.name: Starting Soon
macros.description: Switch OBS to your starting soon scene and announce the stream warmup.

macros.name: BRB
macros.description: Switch to BRB and show a quick overlay note.

macros.name: Hype Moment
macros.description: Fire a random SFX alert for high-energy moments.

macros.name: Raid Response
macros.description: Welcome incoming raiders from the control panel.

actions.message: Welcome in, raiders. Thanks for being here!

macros.name: Emergency Reset
macros.description: Reset the stream border and clear loud visual states.
